mapper.select: SELECT IC.ICKEY /* 모상품 */ , ASRT.ASRTKEY /* 자상품 */ , SUM(IV.AVQTY) AS AVQTY FROM TORDER_MST_IC IC INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT ICXCT ON IC.OWKEY = ICXCT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ICXCT.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ASRT ASRT ON IC.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ASRT.ASRTREPKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_REQORDERIV IV ON ICXCT.OWKEY = IV.OWKEY AND ICXCT.CTKEY = IV.CTKEY AND ICXCT.ICKEY = IV.ICKEY WHERE IFID = #{ifid} GROUP BY IC.ICKEY, ASRT.ASRTKEY

/* oms-inventory-inventoryChkBatch-sql-oracle.xml - selectSendMalIvDdlnInfo */ SELECT IC.ICKEY /* 모상품 */ , COALESCE(ASRT.ASRTKEY, IC.ICKEY) AS OLNICKEY /* 자상품 */ , SUM(AVQTY) AVQTY , SUM(OBEXPCTQTY) AS OBEXPCTQTY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_STOCKDDLN IV LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON IV.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND IV.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT ICXCT ON IV.OWKEY = ICXCT.OWKEY AND IV.CTKEY = ICXCT.CTKEY AND IV.ICKEY = ICXCT.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ASRT ASRT ON IC.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ASRT.ASRTREPKEY
WHERE IFID = #{ifid} GROUP BY IC.ICKEY, ASRT.ASRTKEY
